name: com.donotpetme.cvrfury
description: VRCFury-style avatar tools for ChilloutVR. Add toggles, menus, and size/hue/emission sliders as simple components, convert VRChat avatars in one window, and CVRFury bakes it all into ChilloutVR's Advanced Avatar Settings and animators automatically at upload — non-destructive, your scene stays untouched.
